metadata.guardrail: AI copy is generated from validated metrics and does not modify numeric source data.

hero.headline: Closed-won revenue is ahead of goal by $2,750,000
hero.body: The latest CRM refresh shows $4,750,000 in closed-won sales against a $2,000,000 goal, putting the team at 238% of target.

cards.title: Goal status changed
cards.body: Closed-won sales beat the $2,000,000 goal by $2,750,000. The website copy changed because the CRM-derived metric changed.

cards.title: Pipeline context
cards.body: The validated export contains 24 opportunities totaling $17,225,000, with $11,502,500 in weighted pipeline.

cards.title: Regional concentration
cards.body: West is the largest region in this refresh at $8,365,000 across 6 opportunities.

cards.title: Follow-up queue
cards.body: 6 open opportunities have not been updated in 21+ days, so they stay visible for review.
